/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/NewMusicPlayerTests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/MockPlaybackListener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/TestPlaylistVisitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/ModelTestFixture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/DirectoryTestFixture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/model/SongTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/model/PlaylistTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/model/AdvertisementTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/model/MusicLibraryTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/model/SortingTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/model/ModelTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/RegressionTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/use_cases/PlaySongUseCaseTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/use_cases/SortPlaylistUseCaseTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/use_cases/SearchSongUseCaseTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/use_cases/AddSongUseCaseTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/use_cases/RemoveSongUseCaseTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/test/use_cases/NavigatePlaylistUseCaseTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/model/Song.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/model/ShellSort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/model/QuickSort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/model/Playlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/model/Advertisement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/model/MusicLibrary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/model/Channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayerTests.dir/model/Model.cpp.o -o NewMusicPlayerTests  /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest_main.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a
